ddls:
CREATE TABLE "firms" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firm */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the firm */,
  "firm_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the firm */,
  "hq_address" TEXT /* Headquarters address */,
  "hq_city" TEXT /* Headquarters city */,
  "hq_state" TEXT /* Headquarters state */,
  "hq_zip" TEXT /* Headquarters zip */,
  "hq_country" TEXT /* Headquarters country */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the firm belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the firm operates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm the analyst belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the analyst */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysts_firm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firm_id") REFERENCES firms ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm being recommended */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst making the recommendation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the firm (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation made by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, outperform) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price set by the analyst */,
  "rationale" TEXT /* Rationale for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_firm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firm_id") REFERENCES firms ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm being rated */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the firm (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., credit, equity, ESG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_targets" (
  "price_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price target */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm being targeted */,
  "price_target_date" TEXT /* Date the price target was set */,
  "price_target" REAL /* Price target set for the firm */,
  "price_target_type" TEXT /* Type of price target (e.g., one-year, two-year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firm_industries" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the firm belongs to */,
  "firm_industry_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the firm's relationship with the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firm_sectors" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the firm operates in */,
  "firm_sector_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the firm's relationship with the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's relationship with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
